title: Dividing Food Equally
instruction: Complete the sentences about dividing food.
passage: A cake is cut into ___ equal slices. Each slice is 1/8 of the cake. If 4 people share the cake ___, each person gets 2 slices. 2 slices out of 8 = 2/8 = ___. In percentage terms, each person gets ___% of the cake. If one person eats 3 slices, they have eaten ___% of the cake.
